sentences.sentence: In 1866, an American railroad company was constructing a tunnel through the Sierra Nevada mountains.
sentences.translation: 1866年，一家美国铁路公司正在修建一条穿越内华达山脉的隧道。

structure.text: a tunnel through the Sierra Nevada mountains

difficult_points: was constructing 使用过去进行时，交代当时持续进行的工程背景。
through the Sierra Nevada mountains 后置修饰 tunnel，说明隧道的穿越路线。

sentences.sentence: They encountered particularly hard rock, and ordered three crates of the only blasting explosive that could do the job: nitroglycerine.
sentences.translation: 他们遇到了异常坚硬的岩石，于是订购了三箱当时唯一能完成这项工作的爆破炸药：硝化甘油。

structure.text: and ordered three crates of the only blasting explosive

difficult_points: encountered 与 ordered 共享主语 They；that 修饰 the only blasting explosive。
冒号后的 nitroglycerine 具体说明这种唯一可用的炸药。

sentences.sentence: The first of these crates arrived in a postal centre in San Francisco, and upon being accidentally dropped, promptly exploded, killing all 15 people present.
sentences.translation: 其中第一箱抵达旧金山的一处邮政中心后，因意外掉落而立即爆炸，造成现场15人全部死亡。

structure.text: The first of these crates arrived in a postal centre in San Francisco

difficult_points: upon being dropped 是介词＋被动动名词结构，表示“一被掉落”。
killing... 是现在分词结果状语；present 后置修饰 people，意为在场的。

sentences.sentence: The point was taken.
sentences.translation: 人们立刻领会了这个教训。
difficult_points: was taken 是被动表达，这里不是“观点被拿走”，而是“教训被领会”。
The point 指前述爆炸显示硝化甘油极其危险这一事实。

sentences.sentence: 'Nitro' was dangerously shock sensitive.
sentences.translation: “硝化甘油”对震动极其敏感，十分危险。
difficult_points: Nitro 是 nitroglycerine 的简称。
dangerously 修饰 shock sensitive，强调其敏感程度已达到危险水平。

sentences.sentence: Its transportation was soon banned, and from then on, it had to be manufactured by on-site laboratories - an expensive and still quite dangerous task, as the number of deadly explosions would demonstrate.
sentences.translation: 其运输很快被禁止；从那以后，它只能由现场实验室制造——这项工作成本高昂且仍相当危险，后来大量致命爆炸证明了这一点。

structure.text: and from then on, it had to be manufactured by on-site laboratories
an expensive and still quite dangerous task
as the number of deadly explosions would demonstrate

difficult_points: 两个 it/Its 都指 nitroglycerine；had to be manufactured 是情态意义的被动结构。
破折号后的名词短语概括现场制造；as 从句表示后来事实所作的证明。

sentences.sentence: The history of nitroglycerine is full of such sad events.
sentences.translation: 硝化甘油的历史充满了这样的悲剧事件。
difficult_points: such sad events 回指上一段的致命爆炸。
be full of 表示某段历史中反复出现大量此类事件。

sentences.sentence: It was first synthesised in 1847 by Ascanio Sobrero, an Italian chemist, and he was so frightened by his discovery that he did not immediately publish his findings.
sentences.translation: 1847年，意大利化学家阿斯卡尼奥·索布雷罗首次合成了它；他被自己的发现吓得没有立即公布研究结果。

structure.text: It was first synthesised in 1847 by Ascanio Sobrero
and he was so frightened by his discovery
that he did not immediately publish his findings

difficult_points: It 指 nitroglycerine；an Italian chemist 是 Ascanio Sobrero 的同位语。
so... that... 表示程度及结果，即害怕到没有立即发表。

sentences.sentence: He was also the first to caution the world against its use, in both private letters and a journal article, arguing that it was impossible to handle the substance safely.
sentences.translation: 他也是第一个警告世人不要使用硝化甘油的人；他在私人信件和期刊文章中都提出，根本无法安全操作这种物质。

structure.text: to caution the world against its use
in both private letters and a journal article
arguing that it was impossible to handle the substance safely

difficult_points: the first 后的不定式说明“第一个做什么的人”；its 指 nitroglycerine。
arguing... 的逻辑主语是 He，that 从句中 it 是形式主语。

sentences.sentence: However, it was soon discovered that when frozen (at about five degress), nitro was much less sensitive to shock.
sentences.translation: 然而，人们很快发现，硝化甘油冻结时（约五度）对震动的敏感度会低得多。

structure.text: that when frozen (at about five degress), nitro was much less sensitive to shock

difficult_points: 主句 it 是形式主语，真正内容是 that 从句。
when frozen 省略 nitro was；原文 degress 是 degrees 的拼写异常，需保留。

sentences.sentence: The problem was then in thawing it back into liquid form, at which point it became even more unstable.
sentences.translation: 接下来的问题在于将其解冻恢复为液态，而它在这一刻会变得更加不稳定。

structure.text: was then in thawing it back into liquid form
at which point it became even more unstable

difficult_points: thawing 是介词 in 的动名词宾语，it 指 nitro。
at which point 引导非限制性定语从句，point 指恢复液态的时刻。

sentences.sentence: Again, a mounting death toll would testify to this fact.
sentences.translation: 不断上升的死亡人数将再次证明这一事实。
difficult_points: mounting 是现在分词形容词，表示死亡人数持续上升。
this fact 指硝化甘油解冻为液态时更加不稳定。

sentences.sentence: Yet nitroglycerine always remained in demand, being the first practical mining explosive produced.
sentences.translation: 然而，硝化甘油始终有需求，因为它是第一种投入实际使用的采矿炸药。

structure.text: being the first practical mining explosive produced

difficult_points: being... 补充说明它一直有需求的原因，逻辑主语是 nitroglycerine。
produced 是过去分词，后置修饰 explosive。

sentences.sentence: Prior to this, gunpowder was used, but this was limited and clumsy.
sentences.translation: 在此之前，人们使用火药，但这种材料作用有限且使用不便。

structure.text: but this was limited and clumsy

difficult_points: 第一个 this 指硝化甘油成为实用炸药这件事，第二个 this 指 gunpowder。
limited and clumsy 是并列表语，分别说明效能不足和操作笨拙。

sentences.sentence: Gupowder is a'low' explosive, meaning that it 'burns' from layer to layer, producing gases which expand at less than the speed of sound.
sentences.translation: 火药是一种“低爆速”炸药，这意味着它逐层“燃烧”，产生以低于音速的速度膨胀的气体。

structure.text: meaning that it 'burns' from layer to layer
which expand at less than the speed of sound

difficult_points: meaning 与 producing 构成递进嵌套的分词说明，which 修饰 gases。
原文 Gupowder 和 a'low' 均有拼写或空格异常，但必须原样保留。

expressions.text: at less than the speed of sound

sentences.sentence: Nitro is a 'high' explosive, meaning that it 'detonates' - that is, is triggered to react by the virtually instrantancous shock wave, producing gases which expand at more than the speed of sound.
sentences.translation: 硝化甘油是一种“高爆速”炸药，也就是说它会“爆轰”——即由几乎瞬时产生的冲击波触发反应，生成以高于音速的速度膨胀的气体。

structure.text: that is, is triggered to react by the virtually instrantancous shock wave
producing gases which expand at more than the speed of sound

difficult_points: that is 后省略主语 it，对 detonates 作进一步解释；is triggered 是被动语态。
which 修饰 gases；原文 instrantancous 为拼写异常，应保留。

expressions.text: at more than the speed of sound

sentences.sentence: Gunpowder could not efficiently shatter rock (although it was suitable for bullets and artillery shells).
sentences.translation: 火药无法有效炸碎岩石（尽管它适合用于子弹和炮弹）。

structure.text: although it was suitable for bullets and artillery shells

difficult_points: although 从句置于括号中，补充让步信息而不改变主干结论。
it 指 Gunpowder；be suitable for 表示适用于特定用途。

sentences.sentence: Only nitro could really do the job, and a Swedish chemist, Alfred Nobel, became interested.
sentences.translation: 只有硝化甘油真正能胜任这项工作，一位名叫阿尔弗雷德·诺贝尔的瑞典化学家由此产生了兴趣。

structure.text: Only nitro could really do the job
and a Swedish chemist, Alfred Nobel, became interested

difficult_points: Only 修饰主语 nitro，因此不触发部分倒装。
Alfred Nobel 是 a Swedish chemist 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: Nobel's companies were moving from primarily iron and steel production to the almost exclusive manufacture of cannons, armaments, and gunpowder, and he saw the commercial value in making nitroglycerine manageable.
sentences.translation: 诺贝尔的公司正从以钢铁生产为主转向几乎专门制造大炮、军备和火药，而他也看到了让硝化甘油变得可控的商业价值。

structure.text: Nobel's companies were moving from primarily iron and steel production to the almost exclusive manufacture of cannons, armaments, and gunpowder
and he saw the commercial value

difficult_points: move from A to B 表示业务重心的转移。
making nitroglycerine manageable 是 make＋宾语＋形容词补语结构。

sentences.sentence: He began experimenting - at considerable cost.
sentences.translation: 他开始进行实验——付出了相当大的代价。
difficult_points: begin 后接动名词 experimenting，表示开始从事实验。
破折号后的 at considerable cost 强调实验付出的高昂代价。

sentences.sentence: In 1864, his younger brother and several workers were killed in a factory explosion.
sentences.translation: 1864年，他的弟弟和数名工人在一次工厂爆炸中丧生。

structure.text: his younger brother and several workers

difficult_points: were killed 是被动语态，强调爆炸造成的死亡结果。
his 指 Nobel；and 连接两类遇难者构成复合主语。

sentences.sentence: Undererred, Nobel built a new factory in the remote hills of Germany, determined to find the answer.
sentences.translation: 诺贝尔并未气馁，他在德国偏远山区建了一座新工厂，决心找到答案。

structure.text: built a new factory in the remote hills of Germany

difficult_points: 句首 Undererred 应是 Undeterred 的源文拼写异常，语义为“未被吓退”。
determined... 描述 Nobel 建厂时的状态，其逻辑主语也是 Nobel。

sentences.sentence: He first tried combining nitro with conventional gunpowder, marketing the final product as'blasting oil', yet accidental explosions continued.
sentences.translation: 他先尝试把硝化甘油与传统火药混合，并将最终产品作为“爆破油”推向市场，然而意外爆炸仍不断发生。

structure.text: He first tried combining nitro with conventional gunpowder
marketing the final product as'blasting oil'

difficult_points: try combining 表示尝试某种方法；marketing 的逻辑主语是 He。
as'blasting oil' 原文 as 与引号之间缺空格，应原样保留。

sentences.sentence: His factory was destroyed yet again, on two occasions!
sentences.translation: 他的工厂竟又被摧毁了两次！
difficult_points: was destroyed 是被动语态，强调工厂遭受的结果。
yet again 与 on two occasions 共同强化灾难反复发生。

sentences.sentence: The breakthrough finally came when Nobel's company mixed liquid nitroglycerine with an inert absorbent silicate sand, known as 'diatomaccous earth'.
sentences.translation: 突破终于出现了：诺贝尔的公司把液态硝化甘油与一种被称为“硅藻土”的惰性吸附性硅酸盐砂混合起来。

structure.text: when Nobel's company mixed liquid nitroglycerine with an inert absorbent silicate sand

difficult_points: when 从句说明突破出现的具体时刻与做法。
known as... 修饰 sand；diatomaccous 是源文拼写，不能改写。

sentences.sentence: This was produced by grinding down diatomite, a rock found around the local hills.
sentences.translation: 这种材料是把硅藻岩磨碎制成的；硅藻岩是一种在当地山丘周围发现的岩石。

structure.text: a rock found around the local hills

difficult_points: This 指前句的 diatomaccous earth；by 后的动名词说明制作方式。
a rock... 是 diatomite 的同位语，found... 是过去分词后置修饰 rock。

sentences.sentence: It is similar to volcanic pumice, being very light and highly porous, yet it is actually the fossilised remains of diatoms, a hard-shelled alga.
sentences.translation: 它类似火山浮石，质地很轻且孔隙丰富，但实际上是硅藻的化石遗骸；硅藻是一种具有硬壳的藻类。

structure.text: It is similar to volcanic pumice
being very light and highly porous
yet it is actually the fossilised remains of diatoms

difficult_points: being... 补充二者相似的性质，逻辑主语是 It。
a hard-shelled alga 是 diatoms 的同位解释；原文用单数 alga 概括这一生物类别。

sentences.sentence: This combination immediately made nitro less dangerous to handle, and by being solid, more convenient to package and transport.
sentences.translation: 这种组合立刻使硝化甘油操作起来不那么危险，而且由于成为固体，包装和运输也更方便。

structure.text: immediately made nitro less dangerous to handle
and by being solid, more convenient to package and transport

difficult_points: make nitro less dangerous 是 make＋宾语＋形容词补语结构，to handle 限定危险性。
and 后省略 made nitro；by being solid 说明更便于包装运输的原因。

sentences.sentence: Nobel patented his invention in 1867 under the name of'dynamite', based on 'dyna' the Greek word for 'power'.
sentences.translation: 1867年，诺贝尔以“dynamite”之名为这项发明申请了专利；该名称源于希腊语中表示“力量”的“dyna”。

structure.text: Nobel patented his invention in 1867 under the name of'dynamite'

difficult_points: based on... 修饰名称 dynamite，而非 Nobel 本人。
the Greek word for 'power' 是 'dyna' 的同位说明；原文 of'dynamite' 缺空格。

sentences.sentence: In its best-known form, dynamite was made in short paper-wrapped sticks consisting of three quarters intro to one quarter diatomaccous earth, but it would always remain dangerous to manufacture, store, and use.
sentences.translation: 在最广为人知的形态中，炸药被制成纸包短棒，其中由四分之三的硝化甘油和四分之一的硅藻土组成；但它在制造、储存和使用时始终危险。

structure.text: dynamite was made in short paper-wrapped sticks
consisting of three quarters intro to one quarter diatomaccous earth
but it would always remain dangerous to manufacture, store, and use

difficult_points: consisting of... 修饰 sticks；原文 intro 应为 nitro 的异常拼写，diatomaccous 也照录。
it 指 dynamite；to manufacture, store, and use 是三个并列不定式，说明危险涉及哪些操作。

expressions.meaning_zh: 以其最广为人知的形式

sentences.sentence: Over time, the nitro can seep out, crystallising on the outside of the sticks or pooling at the bottom of storage boxes, with all the consequent instability that raw nitro possesses.
sentences.translation: 随着时间推移，硝化甘油可能渗出，在炸药棒外部结晶，或积聚在储存箱底部，并带来原始硝化甘油所具有的一切不稳定性。

structure.text: crystallising on the outside of the sticks or pooling at the bottom of storage boxes
with all the consequent instability that raw nitro possesses

difficult_points: crystallising 与 pooling 是并列分词，说明渗出后可能出现的两种状态。
that 引导定语从句修饰 instability，并在从句中作 possesses 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Nevertheless, in an age of extensive railroad and tunnel construction, the product would earn Nobel a great fortune.
sentences.translation: 尽管如此，在铁路和隧道大规模建设的时代，这种产品还是会为诺贝尔带来巨额财富。

structure.text: in an age of extensive railroad and tunnel construction
would earn Nobel a great fortune

difficult_points: Nevertheless 表示虽有危险，商业结果却依然可观。
earn Nobel a great fortune 是动词＋间接宾语＋直接宾语结构。

sentences.sentence: Yet, while high explosives serve a commendable purpose in peacetime engineering projects, Nobel's fortune was also based on weapons of death and destruction, and the public knew it.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管烈性炸药在和平时期的工程项目中有值得肯定的用途，诺贝尔的财富也建立在制造致死与毁灭性武器之上，而公众对此心知肚明。

structure.text: while high explosives serve a commendable purpose in peacetime engineering projects
Nobel's fortune was also based on weapons of death and destruction

difficult_points: while 在此引导让步从句，意为“尽管”，不是单纯表示同时。
it 指诺贝尔的财富也来源于死亡与毁灭性武器这一事实。

sentences.sentence: Nobel himself was to become greatly perturbed, especially given the events which occurred when his brother Ludvig died.
sentences.translation: 诺贝尔本人后来深受困扰，尤其是考虑到他的兄弟路德维格去世时发生的那些事情。

structure.text: which occurred when his brother Ludvig died

difficult_points: was to become 表示后来实际发生的变化；himself 用于强调 Nobel 本人。
which 修饰 events，内部 when 从句说明事件发生的时间背景。

sentences.sentence: The French newspapers mistakenly thought it was the death of Alfred himself, and published an obituary.
sentences.translation: 法国报纸误以为去世的是阿尔弗雷德本人，并刊登了一篇讣告。

structure.text: it was the death of Alfred himself

difficult_points: thought 后省略 that，it was... 是其宾语从句。
published 与 thought 共享主语；himself 强调误报的对象是 Alfred 而非其兄弟。

sentences.sentence: Alfred happened to be in France at the time, and one can only wonder at his reaction upon reading about his own death!
sentences.translation: 阿尔弗雷德当时恰好身在法国，人们只能想象他读到自己死讯时会有何反应！

structure.text: Alfred happened to be in France at the time
and one can only wonder at his reaction
upon reading about his own death

difficult_points: happen to do 表示碰巧处于某种情况。
upon reading... 的逻辑主语是 Alfred，说明 his reaction 出现的时刻。

sentences.sentence: Yet the obituary was harsh and condemning, calling Nobel the 'merchant of death', someone who 'became rich by finding ways to kill more people faster than ever before'.
sentences.translation: 然而，这篇讣告措辞严厉且充满谴责，称诺贝尔为“死亡商人”，即一个“通过寻找比以往更快杀死更多人的方法而致富”的人。

structure.text: Yet the obituary was harsh and condemning
who 'became rich by finding ways to kill more people faster than ever before'

difficult_points: calling 是伴随分词，call Nobel the merchant... 为宾语补足语结构。
someone 与 merchant of death 同位，who 从句进一步解释该贬称。

sentences.sentence: It was certainly this event which influenced him, in 1895, to write a new last will and testament, one year before he died.
sentences.translation: 无疑正是这件事促使他在1895年，也就是去世前一年，重新立下遗嘱。

structure.text: to write a new last will and testament

difficult_points: It was... which... 是强调句，突出影响 Nobel 的正是这篇讣告事件。
influence him to write 是动词＋宾语＋不定式补语；one year... 补充时间。

sentences.sentence: It would astonish everyone, and change the course of history.
sentences.translation: 这份遗嘱将震惊所有人，并改变历史进程。

structure.text: and change the course of history

difficult_points: It 指上一句 a new last will and testament。
astonish 与 change 由 and 连接，共享情态助动词 would。

sentences.sentence: When Alfred Nobel died, single and childless, at age 63, he specified that, apart from some minor bequests, his vast fortune (about 200 million dollars in today's money) be set aside for the establishment of the Nobel Prizes.
sentences.translation: 阿尔弗雷德·诺贝尔63岁去世时未婚且无子女；他规定，除少量遗赠外，其巨额财富（按今天币值约合2亿美元）应拨作设立诺贝尔奖之用。

structure.text: When Alfred Nobel died, single and childless, at age 63
that, apart from some minor bequests, his vast fortune (about 200 million dollars in today's money) be set aside for the establishment of the Nobel Prizes

difficult_points: single and childless 是 Alfred Nobel 去世时的补充状态。
specified 后的 that 从句使用 be set aside 虚拟式，表示正式规定；apart from 表示除外。

sentences.sentence: These would be awarded annually for those who confer the 'greatest benefit on mankind' in physics, chemistry, peace, medicine, and literature.
sentences.translation: 这些奖项将每年颁给在物理、化学、和平、医学和文学领域为“人类带来最大福祉”的人。

structure.text: who confer the 'greatest benefit on mankind' in physics, chemistry, peace, medicine, and literature

difficult_points: These 指 the Nobel Prizes；would be awarded 是被动语态。
who 修饰 those；confer benefit on mankind 表示为人类带来福祉。

sentences.sentence: Nobel's strategy worked, as the Nobel Prizes are now considered among the most prestigious in the world.
sentences.translation: 诺贝尔的策略奏效了，因为诺贝尔奖如今被视为世界上最负盛名的奖项之一。

structure.text: as the Nobel Prizes are now considered among the most prestigious in the world

difficult_points: as 引导原因从句，以诺贝尔奖今日的地位证明策略奏效。
are considered 是被动语态；the most prestigious 后省略 prizes。

sentences.sentence: Few consider that all that money comes from nitroglycerine, dynamite, gunpowder, and armament manufacture, the indirect cause of incalculable human carnage.
sentences.translation: 很少有人想到，所有这些资金都来自硝化甘油、炸药、火药和军备制造，而这些正是难以估量的人类杀戮的间接原因。

structure.text: that all that money comes from nitroglycerine, dynamite, gunpowder, and armament manufacture
the indirect cause of incalculable human carnage

difficult_points: Few 本身含否定意义，表示考虑到这一点的人很少。
末尾名词短语同位概括前述爆炸物与军备制造，将其称作杀戮的间接原因。
